title: Administrative services | NHSScotland Careers
content: Home Explore careers Administrative services Administrative services Administrative services make up one of the largest staff groups in the NHSScotland workforce. The NHS relies on people working in administrative roles to make sure healthcare services run efficiently and smoothly every day. Administrative assistant Communications officer Digital delivery manager Finance assistant Health economist HR assistant Information analyst Information security officer IT support engineer Project officer Software engineer Strategic planner Ward clerk Library and knowledge services assistant Senior library and knowledge services assistant Public health librarian Learning for Career Success Learning for Career Success is an online career planning resource for the support workforce. It will help you find work-based learning opportunities to enhance your career. Find out more Help with recruitment We'll guide you through the recruitment process, from applying online and interview preparation to receiving an offer of employment and pre-employment checks. Help with recruitment
